title: Logout — COMPANION: tap Logout on companion home navigates to /(auth)/login

preconditions.description: Expo web app is running and reachable at the configured base URL.
A verified COMPANION account exists with credentials DATA-1 and DATA-2.

journey.description: Wait for navigation to COMPANION home.
Confirm we are on the COMPANION home screen.
Tap the Logout button on COMPANION home.
After logout(), router.replace navigates to login.

assertions.description: COMPANION home screen is visible before logout.
Logout button is visible on COMPANION home screen.
After logout, app navigates to login screen.
Login screen heading is visible after logout.
Session token is cleared from storage after logout.

manualValidationRequired.reason: No supported native automation runner is currently configured.
No supported native automation runner is currently configured.

notes: The Logout button implementation on companion/home.tsx is identical to client/home.tsx — same style (red background #f00, white bold text) and same logout logic.
Unlike the CLIENT logout test, no onboarding localStorage injection is needed here because /(companion)/_layout.tsx does not guard onboarding in M02.
The storageValueAbsent key ('session_token') must be verified against the actual key name used in store/session.ts SecureStore calls.
